scripts.generate: bun ../../packages/generator/bin/generator.ts --spec ../../packages/spec/openapi.yaml --output . --lang python && rm -rf generated/pachca/api generated/pachca/models generated/pachca/client.py generated/pachca/errors.py generated/pachca/pachca_client.py generated/pachca/types.py && mv py/* generated/pachca/ && rmdir py
